reliabilityChanges: Every vector record is a versioned envelope bound to meeting ID, exact transcript integrity, exact derived chunk text, and the MiniLM model/pooling/normalization contract.
Same-ID transcript replacement, altered excerpts, legacy raw arrays, corrupt records, and embedding-schema changes are excluded from semantic ranking and treated as rebuildable.
Ask retains complete hydrated lexical search and visibly directs users to rebuild missing or outdated semantic indexes.
Diagnostic export adds content-free semantic freshness counts without transcript content, excerpts, fingerprints, or model output.

ios.knownHostGate: devicectl timed out waiting for CoreDeviceService to fully initialize; the previous Xcode 26.3 attempt could not mount a developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build, unit, IndexedDB, and rendered browser proof do not prove locked physical 60/120-minute capture, native saved-audio transcription, interruption or memory-pressure delivery during mobile suspension, or destination-app receipt.
